abilities.name: Frenzied Charge
abilities.text: This model may Charge while engaged and ignore the once per activation restriction on Charge.

abilities.name: Juggernaut
abilities.text: This model reduces all damage dealt to it to 3 (if more than 3).

abilities.name: Scalding Rage
abilities.text: After resolving a (melee) action that damaged this model, this model may drain a (soulstone). If it does so, enemy models within (aura)2" are dealt 2 damage and gain a Burning token.

actions.name: Immolation Tusk
actions.costs_and_restrictions: If this action was generated by the Charge action, the target gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: Enraged
triggers.text: Once per activation. This model may declare the Charge action.

triggers.name: Smolder
triggers.text: If the target has a Burning token, it resolves the Burning token. Then, it gains a Burning token.

triggers.name: Herd the Pack
triggers.text: Allies within (r)2" of this model may move up to 2".

triggers.name: Sweeping Strike
triggers.text: A different model within 1" of the target is dealt the same damage -1.

actions.name: Bacon Beeline
actions.costs_and_restrictions: Another ally only. Move the target up to 6" in a straight line, ignoring models. Enemy models moved through this way gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Heavenly Aroma
triggers.text: Allies within (r)2" of the target heal 2.

triggers.name: Set Alight
triggers.text: Enemy models within (r)2" of the target gain a Burning token.
